{{Quote|This boy needs to learn to handle pain, so that when he does die, he does not embarrass his family.|Wedge Antilles|<ref name="SOA" />}}
[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Depird ke Fanax''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Adumari]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[blastsword]] duelist from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]]. In [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], ke Fanax was invited to the court dinner hosted by the [[perator]] of [[Cartann]] to celebrate the arrival of [[Red Flight]], a group of [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilots who came to their world as ambassadors. When [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], leader of Red Flight, asked for a performance from [[Cartann Ground Champion]] [[Cheriss ke Hanadi]], ke Fanax's challenge for a blastsword duel was accepted by ke Hanadi. ke Fanax sought revenge for his brother, [[Jeapird ke Fanax]], who [[Death/Legends|died]] from his injuries after losing a duel with ke Hanadi.<ref name="SOA" />

ke Fanax lost the duel and ke Hanadi gave the choice of his survival to Antilles as a sign of honor. Hesitant to kill someone senselessly, Antilles spared his life.<ref name="SOA" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|I am here to correct the results of an accident, and to demonstrate what we all know—that wherever a ground-pounder can merely achieve, a flier can excel.|Depird ke Fanax|<ref name="SOA" />}}
Depird ke Fanax held the belief that as a pilot, he was ultimately better than any non-pilot duelers.<ref name="SOA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Depird ke Fanax is a character created by author [[Aaron Allston]] for the [[1999]] novel ''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'', the ninth novel in the [[Star Wars: X-Wing (novel series)|''X-Wing'']] series.<ref name="SOA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{1st}}
